title: Lido Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Lido Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
